title: brain evidence retry <evidenceId> — --json success output
description: Re-enqueue a failed evidence re-verification job. Shared, intrinsically idempotent by the (contentId, newRenditionId, owningNoteId) tuple — a repeat retry of an already-queued or in-flight job returns the existing jobId rather than enqueuing a duplicate. Exit 0 on requeue; exit 1 when the evidence does not exist.

evidenceId.description: The evidence id whose re-verification was re-enqueued.

jobId.description: The re-verification job id (existing one on an idempotent repeat).

requeued.description: True when a new job was enqueued; false when an existing queued/in-flight job was returned.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Re-enqueue a failed re-verification job; idempotent by (contentId, newRenditionId, owningNoteId).

args.description: The failed evidence id to retry.

sideEffects: enqueues a re-verification job keyed by (contentId, newRenditionId, owningNoteId)
prohibitedEffects: never enqueues a duplicate job for the same (contentId, newRenditionId, owningNoteId)

errorCodes.when: the vault repo is missing or unreadable
